subject: Bionanotechnology From Theory to Practice
body:
Bionanotechnology From Theory to Practice
        
    
    
        Learn online with the University of Cambridge in this short 6-week course
        


        
        
            
                
                    


                    


                    
                    
                        
                            
                                
                                
                                    
                                        
                                            
                                        
                                    
                                
                                
                            
                        
                    
                    
                    


                    
                    
                        
                            
                                
                                
                                    
                                    
                                
                                
                            
                        
                    
                    
                    


                    
                    
                        
                            
                                
                                
                                Cambridge Advance Online
                                
                                
                            
                        
                    
                    
                    


                    


                
            
        
        
        



        
        
            
                
                    


                    
                    
                        
                            
                                
                                
                                    
                                        
                                             Booking for our September courses closes on 23rd September 2021
                                        
                                    
                                
                                
                            
                        
                    
                    
                    


                
            
        
        
        



        
        
            
                
                    


                    
                    
                        
                            
                                
                                
                                    
                                        
                                            
                                        
                                    
                                
                                
                            
                            
                                
                                 
                                
                            
                            
                                
                                
                                Bionanotechnology 
                                From Theory to Practice
                                
                                
                            
                            
                                
                                
                                An interdisciplinary and up-to-date overview of the rapidly developing area of bionanotechnology. Learn from a leading academic in the field who is based at the internationally recognised Department of Chemical Engineering and Biotechnology at the University of Cambridge. 
                                
                                
                            
                            
                                
                                 
                                
                            
                            
                                
                                
                                    
                                        
                                             Book your place now
                                        
                                    
                                
                                
                            
                        
                    
                    
                    


                
            
        
        
        



        
        
            
                
                    


                    
                    
                        
                            
                                
                                
                                Learn how to use biomedical applications and techniques in a range of industries including medicine, energy and agriculture.
                                
                                
                            
                            
                                
                                
                                Bionanotechnology can help us understand how to combine man-made structures with biomolecules and use nature-inspired design to obtain drug-delivery systems, imaging agents for healthcare, new generation of solar cells and batteries for energy, and so much more.
                                 
                                Clinical researchers, biotechnology consultants, R&D specialists, intellectual property experts, policy makers, medical and graduate students: this certificated, interactive course is for you!
                                 
                                After eight hours per week for six weeks, you will know how to:
                                 
                                
                                    design a functional material or device using bionanotechnology elements
                                    describe how bionanotechnology can be used to address current challenges in medicine and biosensing
                                    make informed decisions based on cost/availability analysis
                                    choose and apply an appropriate bionanotechnology strategy
                                    communicate the unique value proposition of your strategy to relevant stakeholders
